data.title: Skymark Airlines Announces Leadership Changes for Sustainable Growth
data.description:
Skymark Airlines Inc. ( (JP:9204) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Skymark Airlines Inc. has announced changes in its leadership, with a new Representative Director and several new directors set to be appointed following the upcoming Annual Shareholders’ Meeting in June 2025. These changes are part of Skymark’s strategy to adapt to environmental shifts, pursue sustainable growth, and enhance its management structure, potentially impacting its operational efficiency and market positioning.

More about Skymark Airlines Inc.

Skymark Airlines Inc. operates in the airline industry, providing air transportation services. The company focuses on offering reliable and efficient air travel options, aiming to maintain a strong presence in the competitive aviation market.

data.title: Perenti Limited Updates on Market Buy-Back Program
data.description:
Perenti Global ( (AU:PRN) ) has issued an announcement.

Perenti Limited has announced an update regarding its ongoing on-market buy-back program. As of April 14, 2025, the company has repurchased a total of 13,962,067 ordinary fully paid securities, with 160,548 bought back on the previous day. This buy-back initiative is part of Perenti’s strategy to optimize its capital structure and enhance shareholder value.

More about Perenti Global

Perenti Limited operates in the mining services industry, providing a range of services including contract mining, surface mining, underground mining, and drilling services. The company focuses on delivering innovative and sustainable solutions to the mining sector globally.

data.description:
An update from Capricorn Energy PLC ( (GB:CNE) ) is now available.

Capricorn Energy PLC announced transactions involving the acquisition of shares by Palliser Capital (UK) Ltd, a person closely associated with Sachin Mistry, a Non-Executive Director of the company. data.title: CR Construction Chairman Increases Stake, Signals Confidence in Growth
data.description:
CR Construction Group Holdings Limited ( (HK:1582) ) has issued an announcement.

CR Construction Group Holdings Limited announced that its chairman and executive director, Mr. Guan Manyu, has increased his shareholding in the company by purchasing 500,000 ordinary shares, which now totals 0.8% of the company’s issued share capital. Mr. Guan expressed confidence in the company’s growth prospects and may consider further increasing his stake, indicating a positive outlook for the company’s future development.

More about CR Construction Group Holdings Limited

CR Construction Group Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating in the construction industry. The company, along with its subsidiaries, focuses on providing construction services and is listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong.

data.title: UBS Group AG Increases Stake in Nuix Limited
data.description:
Nuix Ltd. ( (AU:NXL) ) has provided an update.

Nuix Limited has experienced a change in the substantial holding of its shares, as UBS Group AG and its related bodies corporate have increased their voting power from 5.13% to 6.32%. This change in shareholding may impact Nuix’s governance and decision-making processes, as UBS Group AG now holds a more significant influence over the company’s voting shares.

data.title: Izumi Co., Ltd. Sets Treasury Share Purchase Price
data.description:
An announcement from Izumi Co., Ltd. ( (JP:8273) ) is now available.

Izumi Co., Ltd. has announced the determination of the purchase price for its treasury shares at 3,305 yen, with a maximum acquisition of 1,000,000 shares, representing 1.40% of its outstanding shares. This move is part of the company’s ongoing strategy to manage its capital structure and enhance shareholder value, although the final number of shares acquired may vary based on market conditions.

data.title: Spacetalk Announces Change in Substantial Holder Interests
data.description:
SPACETALK Limited ( (AU:SPA) ) has shared an update.

Spacetalk Limited, listed on the ASX under the ticker SPA, has announced a change in the interests of a substantial holder, Thorney Technologies Ltd. data.title: Circle S.p.A. Announces Virtual Shareholder Meeting for Financial Review
data.description:
Circle SpA ( (IT:CIRC) ) just unveiled an update.

Circle S.p.A. has announced an ordinary meeting to discuss and approve its financial statements for the year ending December 31, 2024, and to decide on the allocation of operating profits. The meeting will be held virtually, allowing shareholders to participate via video-audio conference, ensuring compliance with corporate governance standards and equal treatment of shareholders. This move highlights Circle S.p.A.’s commitment to modernizing its operations and maintaining transparency with its stakeholders.

data.title: Grange Resources Advances Southdown Magnetite Project with Positive Feasibility Study
data.description:
Grange Resources Limited ( (AU:GRR) ) just unveiled an update.

Grange Resources Limited has completed a feasibility study for the Southdown Magnetite Project, indicating a 6% increase in ore reserves and a production capacity of 5 million tonnes per annum of high-quality magnetite concentrate. The project is expected to generate significant economic benefits, with a nominal project free cash flow of A$10.1 billion and an after-tax NPV of A$877 million. The company is actively seeking joint venture partners and long-term financing options to advance the project, which is strategically positioned to meet the increasing demand for direct reduction grade iron ore in the decarbonizing steel industry.

More about Grange Resources Limited

Grange Resources Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing primarily on the production of magnetite concentrate. The company is involved in developing the Southdown Magnetite Project, which aims to produce high-quality magnetite concentrate for the direct reduced iron (DRI) market, catering to the growing demand for low carbon emission steel production.
